---
title: "Sivalingam S M"
description-meta: "Sivalingam S M | Assistant Professor of Mathematics | Scientific Machine Learning | Dynamical Systems | Control Theory"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.home-page}

::: {.home-grid}

::: {.home-profile-card}

![](images/profile.jpg){.home-photo}

# Sivalingam S M

<div class="home-position">
Assistant Professor
</div>

**Department of Mathematics**

National Institute of Technology Warangal

<div class="home-location">
Warangal, Telangana, India
</div>

---

<div class="home-research-areas">
Scientific Machine Learning · Dynamical Systems · Control Theory
</div>

<div class="home-buttons">

[Email](mailto:siva915544@gmail.com){.home-button}

[GitHub](https://github.com/SivalingamSM){.home-button target="_blank"}

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ezCkT1QAAAAJ&hl=en){.home-button target="_blank"}

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0818-9007){.home-button target="_blank"}

[ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sivalingam-S-M){.home-button target="_blank"}

</div>

:::

::: {.home-main-content}

<div class="home-eyebrow">
MATHEMATICS · SCIENTIFIC MACHINE LEARNING
</div>

## Mathematics for learning, dynamics, and control

My research lies at the intersection of **Scientific Machine Learning** and **Dynamical Systems**, with particular emphasis on the mathematical analysis and computational development of learning-based methods for differential equations and control.

My work spans **neural differential equations**, **physics-informed learning**, **control theory**, **fractional-order systems**, and **data-driven numerical methods**.

<div class="home-research-heading">

<div>
<span class="home-small-label"> </span>

### Latest Research
</div>

[View all publications →](publications.html){.home-view-all}

</div>

{{< include home-updates.qmd >}}

:::

:::

:::
